  2. Complete the online application form through the RCC Grant Management System
  3. Review the available user guide for the application system
  4. Prepare supporting academic and professional documentation
  5. Submit their application before the deadline

Applications submitted early may receive faster consideration due to rolling reviews.

Final Thoughts

The FCDO Senior Research Fellowships 2027 represent one of the most significant opportunities for senior academics seeking to contribute directly to global policymaking, international development, technological governance, and geopolitical strategy.

With placements across eleven high-priority global themes, the programme provides an exceptional platform for experienced researchers to influence policy while advancing impactful interdisciplinary research.

Eligible academics interested in shaping global development and international affairs are encouraged to apply before the 30 August 2026 deadline.

Official Application Link

Applicants can access the official application portal and full fellowship details through the Global Research and Technology Development (GRTD) platform.

Official Website: https://www.grtdprogramme.org/

Learn more and apply

Click HERE to learn more and apply for the FCDO Senior Research Fellowships 2027.

Explore more fully funded PhD opportunities on OFY HERE.

The post FCDO Senior Research Fellowships 2027: Fully Funded Two-Year Fellowship Opportunities Across 11 Global Research Areas appeared first on Opportunities for Youth.

item.title: AIGC for Future Global Challenge 2026: Win USD 10,000 and Showcase Your AI-Generated Creativity on a Global Stage in China and Switzerland
item.dc:creator: Grace Amo
item.description:
The AIGC for Future Global Challenge 2026 is now officially open for applications, inviting young creators, innovators, researchers, interdisciplinary teams, startups, and organizations worldwide to explore how Artificial Intelligence Generated Content (AIGC) can help shape a more sustainable, inclusive, and innovative future. Co-hosted by the Global SDGs and Leadership Development Center (GSLDC), the International Telecommunication […]

The post AIGC for Future Global Challenge 2026: Win USD 10,000 and Showcase Your AI-Generated Creativity on a Global Stage in China and Switzerland appeared first on Opportunities for Youth.
item.content:encoded:
The AIGC for Future Global Challenge 2026 is now officially open for applications, inviting young creators, innovators, researchers, interdisciplinary teams, startups, and organizations worldwide to explore how Artificial Intelligence Generated Content (AIGC) can help shape a more sustainable, inclusive, and innovative future.

Co-hosted by the Global SDGs and Leadership Development Center (GSLDC), the International Telecommunication Union, and the Global Alliance of Cities for the Digital Economy (DEC40), this prestigious international challenge brings together global talent at the intersection of artificial intelligence, creativity, digital innovation, and sustainable development.

The competition will take place in July 2026 across:

  • Beijing
  • Geneva

Participants will have the opportunity to showcase innovative AI-generated works, compete for a total prize pool of USD 10,000, gain international recognition, and connect with global leaders in technology, sustainability, and creative industries.

The extended application deadline is 06 June 2025 at 11:59 PM Beijing Time.

About the AIGC for Future Global Challenge

The AIGC for Future Global Challenge is an international initiative developed under the broader AI for Future framework, designed to encourage responsible, impactful, and creative applications of artificial intelligence technologies.

The challenge specifically focuses on the use of:

  • AI-generated images
  • AI-generated videos
  • AI-generated audio
  • Digital creative storytelling
  • Innovative AI-driven communication

Participants are encouraged to connect artistic creativity with real-world social impact aligned with the:

United Nations Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs)

The challenge aims to empower creators to imagine and design solutions that contribute to a better future through digital innovation and emerging AI technologies.

Organizers and Global Partners

The challenge is co-hosted by several globally recognized organizations:

  • Global SDGs and Leadership Development Center (GSLDC)
  • International Telecommunication Union
  • Global Alliance of Cities for the Digital Economy (DEC40)

These organizations are working together to promote innovation, digital inclusion, youth leadership, and sustainable technological advancement worldwide.

Competition Themes

Participants are invited to submit AI-generated projects aligned with one or more important global themes.

Main Focus Areas Include:

1. Digital Culture

Projects exploring how AI can enhance creativity, storytelling, cultural preservation, digital expression, and artistic innovation.

2. Digital Consumption

Ideas and creative works that rethink digital lifestyles, sustainable consumer behavior, digital commerce, and future economic interactions.

3. Women Empowerment

Projects supporting gender equality, women’s participation in technology, leadership, education, entrepreneurship, and social inclusion.

4. Green Development

AI-driven concepts focused on:

  • Climate action
  • Sustainability
  • Renewable energy
  • Environmental protection
  • Circular economy
  • Green innovation

Accepted Submission Formats

Participants may submit works in various AIGC formats, including:

  • Images
  • Videos
  • Audio projects

This flexibility allows creators to fully explore the possibilities of AI-generated creativity and interdisciplinary storytelling.

Why You Should Apply

The AIGC for Future Global Challenge offers much more than just prize money. It is an opportunity to gain international visibility and engage with global innovators.

Key Benefits Include:

1. Global Recognition

Participants can showcase their work before international institutions, global experts, technology leaders, and creative communities.

Outstanding projects may receive significant international visibility.

2. International Networking Opportunities

Applicants will have opportunities to connect with:

  • AI innovators
  • Researchers
  • Creators
  • Policymakers
  • Technology experts
  • Sustainability leaders

The challenge promotes interdisciplinary collaboration and long-term partnerships.

3. Real-World Impact and Transformation

Selected projects may move beyond the competition into:

  • Public exhibitions
  • Communication campaigns
  • Commercial pathways
  • Cross-border collaborations
  • Broader implementation opportunities

This creates possibilities for long-term visibility and real-world application.

4. Awards and Financial Support

Participants will compete for:

USD 10,000 Prize Pool

Winning participants may also receive:

  • Promotion opportunities
  • Collaboration opportunities
  • Development support
  • International exposure

5. International Exchange Opportunities

Selected participants may participate in international exchange visits linked to major global platforms such as:

  • Global Digital Economy Conference
  • AI for Good Global Summit

These exchanges may include activities in:

  • Beijing, China
  • Geneva, Switzerland

6. Creative Freedom and Innovation

The challenge encourages participants to explore AI creativity with flexibility in:

  • Format
  • Style
  • Storytelling
  • Technical experimentation
  • Interdisciplinary collaboration

Creators are encouraged to think boldly while addressing meaningful global challenges.

Eligibility Requirements

The competition is open to a wide range of participants worldwide.

Applicants Must:

  • Be between 18–40 years old
  • Apply individually or in teams
  • Teams may include up to seven members
  • Be creators, innovators, companies, research institutions, or interdisciplinary groups
  • Demonstrate creativity and alignment with the competition themes

The programme strongly encourages:

  • Cross-disciplinary collaboration
  • International cooperation
  • Creative experimentation

Important Submission Rules

Participants should carefully review the official submission requirements before applying.

Key Rules Include:

1. Team Representative Requirement

Only the designated Team Representative can submit the application on behalf of the team.

The representative is responsible for ensuring:

  • Accurate participant information
  • Correct proposal details
  • Proper consent from all members

2. Submission Limits

Each participant, organization, or team may:

  • Submit up to three entries total
  • Submit only one entry at a time

Applicants may participate across multiple competition tracks provided all submissions meet the technical and thematic guidelines.

3. Final Submission Rule

Once an application is submitted:

  • It cannot be edited

Applicants should therefore carefully review all information before submission.

Programme Timeline

Activity Date
Application Deadline 06 June 2025
Competition Activities July 2026
Host Locations Beijing & Geneva

How to Apply

All applications must be submitted through the official submission form provided by the organizers.

Participants are encouraged to review the official programme documents and proposal criteria carefully before applying.

Applicants can also join the official WhatsApp group for updates and discussions:

  • Official WhatsApp Group

Contact Email

For inquiries:

  • aigc4future@ungyldc.org

Apply Here 

Why This Opportunity Matters

Artificial Intelligence Generated Content (AIGC) is rapidly transforming industries worldwide, including:

  • Education
  • Entertainment
  • Media
  • Healthcare
  • Climate innovation
  • Communication
  • Public awareness
  • Creative arts

This challenge provides a platform for young innovators to demonstrate how AI can be used responsibly and creatively to address global issues and advance sustainable development goals.

It also creates opportunities for emerging creators from around the world to contribute meaningfully to the future of technology and society.

Application Deadline

Extended Deadline: 06 June 2025 (11:59 PM Beijing Time)

Interested participants are strongly encouraged to apply before the deadline.

For more information on this competition visit here

Discover more opportunities on OFY, click here 

The post AIGC for Future Global Challenge 2026: Win USD 10,000 and Showcase Your AI-Generated Creativity on a Global Stage in China and Switzerland appeared first on Opportunities for Youth.
